title: Implement parallel step execution in WrapupRunner
description:
Update RunAgentSteps in internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go to execute steps in parallel groups.

Current: sequential for loop over all steps.
New: group steps by Group field, execute each group's steps in parallel (separate ACP sessions), groups run sequentially.

Algorithm:
1. Sort/group steps by Group number (0 = ungrouped, runs sequentially as group of 1).
2. For each group:
   a. If group has 1 step: run sequentially as today (reuse existing session if SessionAgent).
   b. If group has N>1 steps: launch N goroutines, each opens its own ACP session via SessionAgent.Open(), runs the step, closes session. Collect results via sync.WaitGroup.
3. Save progress after each group completes (not after each step within a parallel group).
4. Crash recovery: skip completed groups, resume from first incomplete group.

For non-SessionAgent agents: parallel groups fall back to sequential (can't open multiple sessions).

The step prompt for parallel steps should NOT include a progress checklist of other steps in the same group (they haven't completed yet). Only show completed groups.

Files: internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go, internal/wrapup/agent_steps_test.go
Tests: mock SessionAgent with 2 parallel steps, verify both run concurrently (timing check), verify sequential fallback for non-SessionAgent.
closed_reason: Refactored RunAgentSteps to group steps by Group field and execute parallel groups concurrently. Steps with same Group>0 launch N goroutines each with its own ACP session via SessionAgent.Open(). Group 0 steps run sequentially reusing a shared session. Non-SessionAgent falls back to sequential. Progress saved per-group. Added groupSteps helper, extracted runSingleStep method. Tests: parallel group, non-session fallback, mixed sequential+parallel.
